subcodes.first_line: O My beloved! Thy book was recited before the Divine Throne, and the sorrows mentioned therein brought grief upon the Ancient Beauty; yet despair not [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حبیب کتاب تو تلقاء عرش تلاوت شد و از احزان مذکورهٴ او بر جمال قدم حزن وارد ولکن لا تیأس
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
